title: Complex computing operations in a gaming network environment
abstract: An exemplary method comprises receiving from a mobile device, an activation code associated with a gaming card; receiving from the mobile device, identification information associated with the mobile device; validating the activation code; in response to validating the activation code, associating or registering the gaming card with the identification information associated with the mobile device; transmitting to a gaming system, a request for a game entry; receiving from the gaming system, the game entry; and transmitting to the mobile device, a digital game ticket comprising or based on the game entry.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A method for executing gaming operations, the method comprising: receiving, using one or more computing device processors, from a mobile device, an activation code associated with a gaming card; receiving, using one or more computing device processors, from the mobile device, identification information associated with the mobile device; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the activation code; in response to validating the activation code, associating or registering, using the one or more computing device processors, the gaming card with the identification information associated with the mobile device; transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to a gaming system, a request for a game entry; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the gaming system, the game entry; and transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the mobile device, a digital game ticket comprising or based on the game entry. 2. The method of claim 1, further comprising generating, using the one or more computing device processors, based on the game entry, the digital game ticket. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein validating the activation code comprises validating the activation code based on gaming card information extracted from the gaming card. 4. The method of claim 3, wherein an interaction between the gaming card and a computing terminal located in an approved jurisdiction associated with a game associated with the game entry causes receipt of or access to the gaming card information at the one or more computing devices from a server in communication with the computing terminal. 5. The method of claim 3, wherein the gaming card information at least partially comprises or is at least partially comprised in gaming card account information comprised in the gaming card. 6. The method of claim 1 , wherein the gaming card is associated with a game and a second game, the second game being different from the game. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein the game entry is associated with a game. 8. The method of claim 1, wherein the game entry is associated with a game and a second game, the second game being different from the game. 9. The method of claim 1 , wherein the gaming card comprises the activation code. 10. The method of claim 9, wherein the gaming card comprises gaming card account information. 11. The method of claim 10, wherein the activation code is visible on the gaming card, and wherein the gaming card account information is not visible on the gaming card. 12. The method of claim 10, wherein the activation code and the gaming card account information are not visible on the gaming card. 13. The method of claim 1, wherein the gaming card comprises gaming card account information. 14. The method of claim 13, wherein an interaction between the gaming card and a computing terminal causes transmission of the gaming card account information to the computing terminal and a server in communication with the computing terminal. 15. The method of claim 14, wherein a second interaction between the gaming card and a second computing terminal causes transmission of the gaming card account information to the second computing terminal and the server, wherein the server is additionally in communication with the second computing terminal. 16. The method of claim 15, further comprising: transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the gaming system, a request for a second game entry; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the gaming system, the second game entry; and transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the mobile device, a second digital game ticket comprising or based on the second game entry. 17. The method of claim 16, wherein the game entry is associated with a game, and wherein the second game entry is associated with the game. 18. The method of claim 16, wherein the game entry is associated with a game, and wherein the second game entry is associated with a second game. 19. The method of claim 14, wherein the computing terminal is located in a first location, and wherein the first location is approved for a game associated with the game entry. 20. The method of claim 19, wherein a second interaction between the gaming card and a second computing terminal causes transmission of the gaming card 

 account information to the second computing terminal and the server, wherein the server is additionally in communication with the second computing terminal. 21. The method of claim 20, wherein the second computing terminal is located in a second location different from the first location. 22. The method of claim 21 , further comprising: transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the gaming system, a request for a second game entry; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the gaming system, the second game entry; and transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the mobile device, a second digital game ticket comprising or based on the second game entry. 23. The method of claim 22, wherein the second game entry is for a second game different from the game. 24. The method of claim 23, wherein the second computing terminal is located in an approved location for the second game. 25. The method of claim 23, wherein the second computing terminal is an approved computing terminal for the second game. 26. The method of claim 14, wherein the server in communication with the computing terminal processes the gaming card account information such that the activation code associated with the gaming card becomes an activatable activation code. 27. The method of claim 1, wherein the gaming card is associated with a predetermined number of game entries. 28. The method of claim 1, wherein the gaming card is associated with a configurable number of game entries. 29. The method of claim 14, wherein the interaction comprises a physical interaction. 30. The method of claim 14, wherein the interaction comprises a wireless interaction. 31. The method of claim 3, wherein an interaction between the gaming card and an approved computing terminal associated with a game associated with the game entry causes receipt of the gaming card information at the one or more computing devices from the computing terminal or a server in communication with the computing terminal. 32. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the gaming system, a result associated with a game associated with the game entry; determining, using the one or more computing device processors, whether the digital game ticket is associated with a winning game entry; in response to determining the digital game ticket is associated with the winning game entry, determining, using the one or more computing device processors, a category associated with the winning game entry; and transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the mobile device and based on the category associated with the winning game entry, a category-specific message. 33. The method of claim 32, wherein the result associated with the game comprises a draw associated with the game. 34. The method of claim 1, wherein the game comprises a lottery game. 35. The method of claim 1, wherein the game comprises a no n- lottery game. 36. The method of claim 1, wherein the game comprises a betting game. 37. The method of claim 1, wherein the game comprises a sports betting game. 38. The method of claim 1, wherein the game comprises a wagering game. 39. The method of claim 1, wherein the gaming card comprises a physical gaming card. 40. The method of claim 1, wherein the gaming card comprises an electronic gaming card. 41. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from a first computing device, a first code associated with the digital game ticket; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the first code; in response to validating the first code, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, a first verification code to a mobile device registered or associated with the first code; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from a second computing device, the mobile device, or the first computing device, a first verification code; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the first verification code; 

 in response to validating the first verification code, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, a second verification code to the second computing device, the first computing device, or the mobile device from which the first verification code was received; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the second verification code; in response to validating the second verification code, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, a notification to the gaming system associated with the game entry. 42. The method of claim 41 , wherein validating the first code comprises validating the activation code based on gaming card information associated with the gaming card. 43. The method of claim 41 , wherein validating the first verification code comprises validating the first verification code based on information. 44. The method of claim 41 , wherein validating the second verification code comprises validating the second verification code based on information. 45. The method of claim 14, wherein the one or more computing device processors are located in one or more apparatuses, the one or more apparatuses in communication with the gaming system, the mobile device, and the server. 46. The method of claim 45, wherein the server comprises an issuer of the gaming card. 47. The method of claim 45, wherein at least one of the one or more apparatuses comprises a game facilitating server for executing operations associated with a game associated with the game entry, wherein a messaging system, in communication with the game facilitating server, implements a rules mechanism for 

 recognizing a gaming event associated with the game and generates an event-specific message when the gaming event occurs. 48. The method of claim 47, wherein the event- specific message is transmitted to the mobile device. 49. The method of claim 47, wherein the messaging system is in communication with a rules editor, the rules editor facilitating synthesis of the rules mechanism. 50. The method of claim 49, wherein a modular architecture for the rules editor effects a portable facility invoking a rule scripting language to implement one or more functions associated with the game. 51. The method of claim 1, further comprising: generating, using the one or more computing device processors, profile data for a game player associated with the digital gaming ticket, wherein the profile data comprises a game playing history for the game player; determining, using the one or more computing device processors, a mobile device associated with or registered to the digital gaming ticket; determining an event associated with a game associated with the digital gaming ticket or the game player; determining, using the one or more computing device processors, based on the event, customized data to transmit to the mobile device associated with or registered to the digital gaming ticket; transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, the determined customized data to the mobile device associated with or registered to the digital gaming ticket. 52. The method of claim 51, wherein the game player comprises a loser associated with the game. 53. The method of claim 51, wherein the data comprises a post-game entry multiplier. 54. The method of claim 51 , wherein the data comprises a pre-game draw multiplier. 55. The method of claim 51, wherein the data comprises non-game-playing data. 56. The method of claim 1, further comprising: generating, using the one or more computing device processors, profile data for a game player associated with the digital gaming ticket, wherein the profile data comprises non-game-playing data; determining the digital gaming ticket is a winning digital gaming ticket associated with a first category; determining, using the one or more computing device processors, a mobile device associated with or registered to the digital gaming ticket; and determining, using the one or more computing device processors, a customized switching message for transmitting to the mobile device, the customized switching message being based on the profile data, the switching message enabling the game player to switch first data associated with being the winner associated with the first category to second data generated based on the profile data. 57. The method of claim 19, further comprising: recording, using the one or more computing device processors, the first location associated with the computing terminal. 58. The method of claim 57, further comprising receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the mobile device, the request for the game entry. 59. The method of claim 58, further comprising determining, using the one or more computing devices processors, a second location of the mobile device at or near a time of receiving the request for the game entry. 60. The method of claim 59, wherein the transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the gaming system, the request for the game entry further comprises: determining a first jurisdiction associated with the first location at least partially matches a second jurisdiction associated with the second location; and in response to determining the first jurisdiction associated with the first location at least partially matches the second jurisdiction associated with the second location, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the gaming system, the request for the gaming entry. 61. The method of claim 59, wherein in response to determining a first jurisdiction associated with the first location does not match a second jurisdiction associated with the second location, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, a message to the mobile device declining the request for the game entry. 62. A method for executing gaming operations, the method comprising: receiving, using one or more computing device processors, from a first computing device, a first code associated with a digital game ticket, wherein the digital game ticket is associated with a physical gaming card, the physical gaming card having been activated based upon: execution of an interaction between the physical gaming card and a computing terminal causing game account information 

 comprised in the physical gaming card to be transmitted to and processed by a server in communication with the gaming terminal, reception of an activation code associated with the physical gaming card, and validation of the activation code; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the first code; in response to validating the first code, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, a first verification code to a mobile device registered or associated with the first code; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from a second computing device, the mobile device, or the first computing device, a first verification code; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the first verification code; in response to validating the first verification code, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, a second verification code to the second computing device, the first computing device, or the mobile device; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the second verification code; and in response to validating the second verification code, transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, a notification to a gaming system that previously transmitted a game entry to the or more computing device processors such that the one or more computing device processors generated the digital game ticket based on the game entry and transmitted the digital game ticket to the mobile device. 63. A method for executing gaming operations, the method comprising: 

 generating, using one or more computing device processors, profile data for a game player associated with a digital gaming ticket associated with a game, wherein the profile data comprises a playing history associated with the game for the game player; determining, using the one or more computing device processors, a mobile device associated with or registered to the game player; determining an event associated with the game or the game player; determining, using the one or more computing device processors, based on the event, customized data to transmit to the mobile device associated with or registered to the game player; transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, the determined customized data to the mobile device associated with the game player. 64. The method of claim 63, wherein the game player comprises a loser associated with the game. 65. The method of claim 63, wherein the data comprises a post-game entry multiplier. 66. The method of claim 63, wherein the data comprises a pre-game draw multiplier. 67. The method of claim 63, wherein the data comprises non-game-playing data. 68. The method of claim 63, wherein the customized data is dynamically determined immediately after occurrence of the event. 69. The method of claim 63, wherein the game comprises a lottery game. 70. The method of claim 63, wherein the game comprises a non- lottery game. 71. The method of claim 63, wherein the game comprises a betting game. 72. The method of claim 63, wherein the game comprises a sports betting game. 73. The method of claim 63, wherein the game comprises a wagering game. 74. The method of claim 63, wherein the digital gaming ticket is transmitted to the mobile device based on: receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the mobile device, an activation code associated with the gaming card; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the mobile device, identification information associated with the mobile device; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the activation code; in response to validating the activation code, associating or registering, using the one or more computing device processors, the gaming card with the identification information associated with the mobile device; transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to a gaming system, a request for a game entry; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the gaming system, the game entry; and transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the mobile device, the digital game ticket comprising or based on the game entry. 75. The method of claim 74, wherein prior to receiving the activation code, a physical interaction between the gaming card and a computing terminal causes transmission of gaming card account information comprised in the gaming card to the computing terminal and a server in communication with the computing terminal, and wherein the server processes the gaming card account information. 76. A method for executing gaming operations, the method comprising: generating, using one or more computing device processors, profile data for a game player associated with a digital gaming ticket associated with a game, wherein the profile data comprises non-game-playing data; determining the digital gaming ticket is a winning digital gaming ticket associated with a first category; determining, using the one or more computing device processors, a mobile device associated with or registered to the game player; and determining a customized switching message for transmitting to the mobile device, the customized switching message being based on the profile data, the switching message enabling the game player to switch first data associated with being the winner associated with the first category to second data generated based on the profile data. 77. The method of claim 76, wherein the data comprises game-playing data. 78. The method of claim 76, wherein the digital gaming ticket is transmitted to the mobile device based on: receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the mobile device, an activation code associated with the gaming card; 

 receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the mobile device, identification information associated with the mobile device; validating, using the one or more computing device processors, the activation code; in response to validating the activation code, associating or registering, using the one or more computing device processors, the gaming card with the identification information associated with the mobile device; transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to a gaming system, a request for a game entry; receiving, using the one or more computing device processors, from the gaming system, the game entry; and transmitting, using the one or more computing device processors, to the mobile device, the digital game ticket comprising or based on the game entry. 79. The method of claim 78, wherein prior to receiving the activation code, a physical interaction between the gaming card and a computing terminal causes transmission of gaming card account information comprised in the gaming card to the computing terminal and a server in communication with the computing terminal, and wherein the server processes the gaming card account information. 80. The method of claim 76, wherein the game comprises a lottery game. 81. The method of claim 76, wherein the game comprises a non-lottery game. 82. The method of claim 76, wherein the game comprises a betting game. 83. The method of claim 76, wherein the game comprises a sports betting game. 84. The method of claim 76, wherein the game comprises a wagering game. 85. A network system for executing gaming operations, the network system comprising: a game facilitating server for executing operations associated with a game; a messaging system, in communication with the game facilitating server, the messaging system implementing a rules mechanism for recognizing a gaming event and generating an event-specific message when the gaming event occurs; and a rules editor in communication with the messaging system, the rules editor facilitating synthesis of the rules mechanism, wherein a modular architecture for the rules editor effects a portable facility invoking a rule scripting language to implement one or more functions associated with the game. 86. The network system of claim 85, wherein the game facilitating server is configured for: receiving, from a mobile device, an activation code associated with the gaming card; receiving, from the mobile device, identification information associated with the mobile device; validating the activation code; in response to validating the activation code, associating or registering the gaming card with the identification information associated with the mobile device; transmitting, to a gaming system, a request for a game entry; receiving, from the gaming system, the game entry; and transmitting, too the mobile device, the digital game ticket comprising or based on the game entry. 87. The network system of claim 86, wherein prior to receiving the activation code, a physical interaction between the gaming card and a computing terminal causes transmission of gaming card account information comprised in the gaming card to the computing terminal and a server in communication with the computing terminal, and wherein the server processes the gaming card account information. 88. The network system of claim 85, wherein the game comprises a lottery game. 89. The network system of claim 85, wherein the game comprises a non- lottery game. 90. The network system of claim 85, wherein the game comprises a betting game. 91. The network system of claim 85, wherein the game comprises a sports betting game. 92. The network system of claim 85, wherein the game comprises a wagering game. 93. The method of claim 1, wherein the identification information comprises a phone number associated with the mobile device. 94. The method of claim 1, wherein the identification information comprises at least one of device model identification information, device serial identification information, or device manufacturer identification information associated with the mobile device.
